boundaries.title_guess: France: Picardy & Burgundy (St Quentin, Montbard, Dijon, Provins)

evidence.excerpt: Tuesday [?7/6]th August  10 we left home + dropped Tinder off at kennels. The trafic + cars in the waiting area at the Channel Tunnel were lighter than usual.
Labyrinthe at St Quentin / Picardie / Catthedrals

boundaries.mixed_detail: B_0217_L opens with the END of a prior Welsh trip (Swan Hotel, Glad Mountain Gliding Club, Abergavenny, Raglan Castle, 'Then on to home.'), then breaks at '__Tuesday [?7/6]th August__ 10 we left home' which begins this France trip.

boundaries.title_guess: Watlington: White Mark Farm with William & Joseph

evidence.excerpt: Friday 27th September  2.30. Simon, Eve + Tinder set off to meet William + Joseph for camping trips... We camped at White Mark Farm, near the Carriers Arms Pub, Watlington.

boundaries.title_guess: Surrey: Rudgwick Riverside Farm (Mylo Ruby's christening, Woking)

evidence.excerpt: October 18th Friday  3.0. We left for south of Guilford, Rudgwick Riverside Farm... We have come down for Mylo Ruby's christening at Church of the Good Shepherd near Woking.
We left at 2 + got home at 4.45. A lovely last trip of the year.

boundaries.mixed_detail: B_0226_L opens with the END of the White Mark Farm trip ('dropped off William & Joseph at Princes Risborough... Home via Gaydon & M.40.'), then breaks at 'October 18th Friday 3.0. We left for south of Guilford' which begins this trip.

boundaries.title_guess: Felsted: Sewards Hall Farm with William & Joseph (Docklands)

evidence.excerpt: May 16th. 2.45. Simon, Eve & Tinder left to drive to meet William & Joseph near Felsted... Sewards Hall Farm.

boundaries.mixed_detail: B_0228_L opens with a short undated 'April 2014' note ('We had tea in the van at Lapworth & walked along the canal.'), then breaks at 'May 16th. 2.45. Simon, Eve & Tinder left to drive to meet William & Joseph near Felsted' which begins this trip. The April note may itself be a brief separate outing or just a jotting.

boundaries.title_guess: Duns Tew, Hinton Parva, Ashdown House, Stonehenge & Bemerton (Eve's birthday)

evidence.excerpt: Friday June 6th. 3.10. Simon, Eve + Tinder set off for Charles'. 2 flats at [?Suns] Tew. There we arrived just before William + Bryony, Joseph + Seb.
08 Jun 2014 ... On to Ashdown House, a hunting lodge built in 1662 by Lord Craven

boundaries.mixed_detail: B_0229_R opens with the END of the Felsted/Docklands trip ('set off north... We got home + Simon mowed the lawn before the church Book Club came.'), then breaks at 'Friday June 6th. 3.10. Simon, Eve + Tinder set off for Charles'' which begins this trip. This single trip appears to run on through Hinton Parva, Ashdown House, Stonehenge (ticket dated 08 Jun 2014, spreads B_0230-B_0231) and Bemerton/Farnham (B_0232); the 'July 11' note on B_0232_L is a reference to a future George Herbert festival/John's graduation, not necessarily the trip date.

evidence.excerpt: Friday June 27th. Simon, Eve + Tinder left just after 6. We arrived about 7.45 at Great Rissington, Ashespring
Then tea, then we all left. The first time we had to stop on the return journey was at the Green Man red light in Harborne.

boundaries.title_guess: France & Brittany (les Haies de Nolettes, Tréguier, Carnac, Malestroit, Falaise/Montormel)

evidence.excerpt: August 19th 2014. John's birthday... Simon decided to leave today evening instead of tomorrow morning... We set off at 6.10 pm... We've arrived at __les Haies de Nolettes__ *** where we've been before.
Tréguier, Brittany. St. Yves, patron saint of lawyers
Saturday Oct 3[rd] 4th  Thomas is in India... At 11.30 we set off with Austin to __Wolverley__ to camp for the night & go on a bike ride.

boundaries.mixed_detail: Boundary falls at the page break: B_0244_L ends the France/Brittany trip ('Saturday 30th August... we set off for [?Tinds] on the way home.'); B_0244_R begins entirely with the new Wolverley trip.

evidence.excerpt: Oct 11th 2014 Saturday  8.20. Simon, Eve & Tinder left for...
back into the van & back to B'ham for tea.

boundaries.mixed_detail: B_0245_L opens with the END of the Wolverley/Stourport trip ('Back to the camp for [tea] then set off home.'), then breaks at 'Oct 11th 2014 Saturday 8.20. Simon, Eve & Tinder left for' which begins this Norfolk trip.

notes: Window transcripts cover spreads B_0217-B_0246, all in volB_book4 (index entries 37-66). The diary in this stretch is roughly chronological from August 2013 (France) through October 2014 (Norfolk). Several physical pages carry a trip-end followed immediately by the next trip-start (mixed). Lowest confidence is the June 2014 Suns Tew/Hinton Parva/Stonehenge/Bemerton sequence (B_0229_R-B_0232): it MAY be one continuous June outing or could split into two (an early-June birthday trip ending after Stonehenge, then a separate Bemerton/Farnham trip around 'July 11' / John's graduation). The narrative reads as continuous with no explicit return-home between, so I report it as one trip at confidence 0.62. The opening of B_0217_L (Welsh trip end) and start of the window's first France trip suggest this window continues from the previous window.
